title: croton shreveanus
intro: Croton shreveanus, also known as Mexican firecracker or Shreve's croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton shreveanus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in water to make a tea, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
